economic_notes: Nation holds 25% interest in Hayu Fishing Limited Partnership and 25% interest in Hayu Fishing Ltd., accounted for by modified equity method.
notes: Nuu-chah-nulth Tribal Council funding ($4,176,051) likely includes ISC pass-through funding but is not broken out separately. Two entities accounted for by modified equity method (Hayu Fishing LP and Hayu Fishing Ltd) are excluded from consolidation. Prior year revenue was significantly higher ($21.4M vs $10.2M) largely due to other revenue of $4.5M and government of Canada funding of $3.6M in 2021. Management responsibility letter is dated September 09, 2021 which appears inconsistent with the March 31, 2022 fiscal year end. Cash flow statement shows cash end of year as $3,802,886 vs balance sheet $3,802,889 - minor rounding difference. Accumulated surplus beginning of 2022 shows $26,376,926 in changes statement but $26,376,925 on balance sheet - minor rounding.
